name: German Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, cook the potatoes until just tender; drain.
2. Peel and slice into a large bowl; set aside.
3. In a skillet, cook the bacon until crisp. Remove the bacon to paper towels; discard all but 1/3 cup of drippings.
4. Sauté the onion in the drippings until tender. Stir in the next six ingredients (flour, sugar, salt, celery seed, ground mustard, and pepper).
5. Gradually stir in water and vinegar; bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
6. Cook and stir for 2 minutes more. Pour over potatoes.
7. Crumble the bacon and gently stir into potatoes. Sprinkle with parsley.
Yield: 12-14 servings.
